content.text: {"id":"KB-002","title":"Non-Returnable Items","category":"returns","summary":"Certain item categories are not eligible for return.","body":"The following items cannot be returned: digital downloads, gift cards, perishable goods, personalized/custom items, and items marked \u2018Final Sale\u2019. For hygiene reasons, earbuds and in-ear headphones may only be returned if unopened. If you received a defective item, contact support within 48 hours of delivery regardless of the return window.","url":"https://help.example.com/returns/exclusions","last_updated":"2026-04-01"}
